_comment: Example residential-proxy pool for the scraping API. Copy to fleet_proxies.json (gitignored) and replace placeholders with real per-node proxy URLs.
_format: Each entry: { proxy_url: 'http://USER:PASS@HOST:PORT', host_ip: 'public IP of the node hosting this proxy (ops only)' }
_egress_note: All proxy URLs in this example use RFC 5737 documentation IPs. Real config points to your residential-proxy provider's per-IP credentials (e.g. Proxy-Cheap, IPRoyal).
